headline: Salesforce stock in focus post-earnings: Analyst shares bull case
summary: Salesforce (CRM) reported first quarter results on Wednesday after the closing bell. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) came in at $3.88 (compared to analyst estimates of $3.13), and revenue came in at $11.13 billion (compared to analyst estimates of $11.05 billion). Wolfe Research managing director and head of software research, Alex Zukin, joins Yahoo Finance to discuss the results, highlighting why he's bullish on the name despite risks he sees.

headline: Salesforce’s (NYSE:CRM) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
summary: CRM software giant Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 13.3% year on year to $11.13 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $11.31 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.88 per share was 24.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

raw.headline: Salesforce’s (NYSE:CRM) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates

The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $11.31 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.88 per share was 24.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Salesforce sees quarterly revenue below estimates amid AI disruption fears
summary: Salesforce forecast second-quarter revenue below Wall Street estimates on ‌Wednesday amid ongoing concerns that AI ‌rivals such as Anthropic could rapidly disrupt demand for ​traditional software vendors. Like its peers, Salesforce is contending with growing investor concerns that AI tools could pull enterprise clients away from ‌traditional software ⁠by taking over tasks once done by their products. Its shares ⁠fell 3% in extended trading.

Its shares ⁠fell 3% in extended trading.
